name: A.S. & Sons Pawn Shop
description_short: Family-owned pawn and jewelry shop with 30+ years experience offering collateral loans, jewelry sales, watch trading, and community charity programs.
description_long:
A.S. & Sons Diamonds is a family-owned business that has operated for over thirty years in the jewelry, diamonds, watches, gold, coins, and collateral lending space. The company positions itself as a full-service precious metals and pawn operation serving their local community with established expertise across multiple product categories.

The company's core services include collateral-based cash loans (pawn), buying and selling jewelry and diamonds, watch sales and trading (including luxury brands like Rolex and Cartier), coin dealing, and precious metals transactions. They explicitly state they "Build, Buy, Sell, Trade and Loan $," indicating a comprehensive pawn shop model. Their website includes a formal inquiry system for watch purchases, suggesting they have access to both new and used timepieces on demand.

A.S. & Sons differentiates itself through community engagement and flexible lending terms. They host annual charity events providing free food, clothes, and toys to the community, and notably offered interest-free loans throughout March during the pandemic—a practice they committed to continuing annually. This positions them as community-focused beyond typical pawn transactions.

The company appears legitimate and established with an AM NY press release reference and documented charitable work. However, the website lacks specific detail on loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, or typical loan amounts—standard information consumers need when considering pawn shops. No physical address or phone number is readily visible on the provided content, which may create friction for local customers seeking immediate contact.
pros: 30+ years of documented family business experience in jewelry, diamonds, and collateral lending
Offers interest-free loans during March annually, demonstrating flexible lending practices
Active community charity program with annual events providing free goods to neighbors
Buys, sells, trades, and provides loans—comprehensive pawn shop model for multiple needs
Access to luxury watch inventory including Rolex and Cartier through established supplier relationships
AM NY press release coverage indicates local media recognition and legitimacy
Online inquiry form for watch purchases suggests willingness to source specific items for customers
cons: Website lacks transparent loan terms, APR rates, redemption periods, or typical loan amounts
No visible phone number or physical address on the homepage for immediate customer contact
Limited detail on collateral evaluation process or what items qualify for pawn loans
No information about insurance, appraisal credentials, or third-party certifications for jewelry/watches
Charity messaging may obscure standard pawn shop practices or create unclear expectations about lending terms
best_for: Local community members in their service area seeking quick collateral-based cash loans
Jewelry, watch, or precious metals sellers looking for immediate buyout or trade options
Customers interested in purchasing pre-owned luxury watches without retail markup
Community-minded borrowers who value doing business with a locally-rooted, charitable business
diagnosis: A.S. & Sons Diamonds is best for local customers seeking collateral loans or wanting to buy/sell/trade jewelry and watches from an established family business with genuine community ties. The main caveat is the complete absence of transparent loan terms and rates on their website—borrowers must contact them directly to understand APR, loan duration, and redemption requirements before proceeding.
services: Luxury watch sourcing (Rolex, Cartier, other brands)
Annual community charity events with free food, clothes, and toys
Watch purchase inquiry and fulfillment service
